name: Productboard
description: Monitor Productboard product management for team access and feature prioritization compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Productboard at https://app.productboard.com
2. Go to Profile → Integrations → API Access
3. Generate an API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Productboard Profile → Integrations → API Access

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Productboard features to confirm team members have appropriate access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Productboard is accessible and product management is active
